synced:
[00:19.18] Brown guilty eyes and little white lies, yeah
[00:23.58] I played dumb, but I always knew
[00:28.45] That you talked to her, maybe did even worse
[00:32.95] I kept quiet so I could keep you
[00:37.40] And ain't it funny how you ran to her
[00:42.84] The second that we called it quits?
[00:47.11] And ain't it funny how you said you were friends?
[00:52.29] Now it sure as hell don't look like it
[00:56.95] You betrayed me
[00:59.82] And I know that you'll never feel sorry for the way I hurt, yeah
[01:07.02] You talked to her when we were together
[01:11.44] Loved you at your worst, but that didn't matter
[01:16.58] It took you two weeks to go off and date her
[01:21.05] Guess you didn't cheat, but you're still a traitor
[01:26.77] 
[01:30.38] Now you bring her around just to shut me down
[01:35.24] Show her off like she's a new trophyㅤ
[01:39.74] And I know if you were true, there's no damn way that you
[01:44.79] Could fall in love with somebody that quickly
[01:49.59] Ain't it funny? All the twisted games
[01:54.55] All the questions you used to avoid
[01:59.04] Ain't it funny? Remember I brought her up
[02:04.11] And you told me I was paranoid?
[02:08.53] You betrayed me
[02:11.76] And I know that you'll never feel sorry for the way I hurt, yeah
[02:19.05] You talked to her when we were together
[02:23.55] Loved you at your worst, but that didn't matter
[02:28.60] It took you two weeks to go off and date her
[02:33.17] Guess you didn't cheat, but you're still a traitor
[02:39.50] (Ah-ah-ah) God, I wish that you had thought this through
[02:45.39] Before I went and fell in love with you
[02:49.06] (Ah-ah-ah) when she's sleepin' in the bed, we made
[02:54.68] Don't you dare forget about the way
[02:57.07] You betrayed me
[02:59.82] 'Cause I know that you'll never feel sorry for the way I hurt, yeah
[03:07.12] You talked to her when we were together
[03:11.77] You gave me your word, but that didn't matter
[03:16.36] It took you two weeks to go off and date her
[03:21.24] Guess you didn't cheat
[03:23.76] But you're still, you're still a traitor (ah-ah-ah)
[03:30.62] 
[03:33.11] Yeah, you're still a traitor
[03:37.26] Ooh-ooh-ooh
[03:40.68] God, I wish that you had thought this through
[03:43.16] Before I went and fell in love with you
[03:44.99]
plain:
Brown guilty eyes and little white lies, yeah
I played dumb, but I always knew
That you talked to her, maybe did even worse
I kept quiet so I could keep you

And ain't it funny how you ran to her
The second that we called it quits?
And ain't it funny how you said you were friends?
Now it sure as hell don't look like it

You betrayed me
And I know that you'll never feel sorry for the way I hurt, yeah
You talked to her when we were together
Loved you at your worst, but that didn't matter
It took you two weeks to go off and date her
Guess you didn't cheat, but you're still a traitor

Now you bring her around just to shut me down
Show her off like she's a new trophyㅤ
And I know if you were true, there's no damn way that you
Could fall in love with somebody that quickly

Ain't it funny? All the twisted games
All the questions you used to avoid
Ain't it funny? Remember I brought her up
And you told me I was paranoid?

You betrayed me
And I know that you'll never feel sorry for the way I hurt, yeah
You talked to her when we were together
Loved you at your worst, but that didn't matter
It took you two weeks to go off and date her
Guess you didn't cheat, but you're still a traitor

(Ah-ah-ah) God, I wish that you had thought this through
Before I went and fell in love with you
(Ah-ah-ah) when she's sleepin' in the bed, we made
Don't you dare forget about the way

You betrayed me
'Cause I know that you'll never feel sorry for the way I hurt, yeah
You talked to her when we were together
You gave me your word, but that didn't matter
It took you two weeks to go off and date her
Guess you didn't cheat
But you're still, you're still a traitor (ah-ah-ah)

Yeah, you're still a traitor

Ooh-ooh-ooh
God, I wish that you had thought this through
Before I went and fell in love with you
